detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BETHERTokenSale.buyTokens(address) (BethereumToken.sol#1049-1111):
	External calls:
	- newTokens = addBonusTokens(token.totalSupply(),newTokens) (BethereumToken.sol#1085)
	- tokensWouldAddTo = newTokens.add(token.totalSupply()) (BethereumToken.sol#1089)
	- token.mint(_buyer,newTokens) (BethereumToken.sol#1095)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- weiRaised = weiWouldAddTo (BethereumToken.sol#1101)
	Crowdsale.weiRaised (BethereumToken.sol#781) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BETHERTokenSale.buyTokens(address) (BethereumToken.sol#1049-1111)
	- Crowdsale.weiRaised (BethereumToken.sol#781)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [BETHERTokenSale.buyTokens(address)](BethereumToken.sol#L1049-L1111):
	External calls:
	- [newTokens = addBonusTokens(token.totalSupply(),newTokens)](BethereumToken.sol#L1085)
	- [tokensWouldAddTo = newTokens.add(token.totalSupply())](BethereumToken.sol#L1089)
	- [token.mint(_buyer,newTokens)](BethereumToken.sol#L1095)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [weiRaised = weiWouldAddTo](BethereumToken.sol#L1101)
	[Crowdsale.weiRaised](BethereumToken.sol#L781) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [BETHERTokenSale.buyTokens(address)](BethereumToken.sol#L1049-L1111)
	- [Crowdsale.weiRaised](BethereumToken.sol#L781)
